title: rosa × dumetorum var. globata
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. globata, also known as the wild rose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rosa genus and is a hybrid of Rosa dumetorum and Rosa canina. The medicinal properties of Rosa × dumetorum var. globata lie in its leaves, hips, and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to their high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, improve skin health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rosa × dumetorum var. globata include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and other health problems.
